questions.q: According to the WHO in a May 2026 report, an outbreak of what suspected rodent-transmitted virus left three people dead on a cruise ship in the Atlantic Ocean?
In early May 2026, German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul urged which nation to completely abandon nuclear weapons and reopen the Strait of Hormuz?
In May 2026, Ukraine launched a wave of drone strikes hitting Primorsk, a major oil-exporting port on the Baltic Sea belonging to which country?
Which US President announced in May 2026 that the US military would "guide ships safely" out of the Strait of Hormuz amidst a conflict with Iran?
Which South American nation opened a human trafficking probe in early May 2026 after its citizens were allegedly lured with fake job offers to fight in the Russian army?
